item.title: Version 1.1.3
item.description:
v1.1.3 — Quality of Life

  • Double-click the title bar to maximize/restore the window
  • Renamed "suitecase" → "suitcase" throughout the app
  • Direct PDF URL import — paste any HTTP or local file:// PDF URL
  • Right-click rename and auto-rename from PDF
  • Cmd+W to close window
  • Reorganized context menus with logical groupings
  • Fix DropdownButton crash and tag recommendations type cast

Note: Local data paths changed (paper_suitcase.db, .papersuitcase/). If migrating manually, rename your existing data folders.

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
v1.1.0 — Auto-Update System

  • Auto-update checking via Sparkle 2
  • Update notification badge on settings icon
  • About section in Settings with version info
  • PDF viewer right-click context menu
  • Fix Google/GitHub OAuth in release builds
  • DMG installer with drag-to-Applications
